sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7660" key="a)natripte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-τριπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n7660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must chafe,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:26:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.26.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
